target_user.description: Product leads coordinating business discovery and coding agents
target_user.need_or_value: A fast, reviewable handoff into bounded implementation

economic_buyer.description: Product or engineering leader owning delivery budget
economic_buyer.need_or_value: Avoided low-value implementation and a reliable audit trail

job_to_be_done: Decide whether an MVP is the cheapest sufficient experiment before a coding agent begins implementation.
problem_statement: Fast code generation can outrun business validation and leave teams without a clear record of who authorized what.
differentiation: A deterministic kernel treats the commercial model as an advisor and binds actual authority to human-signed, hash-protected scope.
value_proposition: Make should-we-build decisions faster, falsifiable, and safely executable by repository-local agents.
revenue_or_roi_hypothesis: Avoiding one unnecessary multi-day build per quarter pays for the team workflow.
distribution_hypothesis: A repository template and one-command demo will seed adoption inside product-engineering teams.
cost_hypothesis: A standard-library kernel and existing CI keep adoption and operating costs low.

ranked_hypotheses.statement: Product leads using coding agents need an enforceable business-readiness handoff before implementation begins.
ranked_hypotheses.why_it_matters: Without this need the workflow creates friction rather than productivity.
ranked_hypotheses.falsification_condition: Fewer than three of five target users report the problem and intent to use a bounded handoff.

kill_or_pivot_trigger.condition: The evidence threshold is missed after five independent interviews.

confidence.rationale: This is a model-generated recommendation awaiting external evidence.

recommended_next_experiment.decision_to_unlock: Determine whether the governed handoff solves a recurring target-user problem.
recommended_next_experiment.procedure: Interview two product leads and preserve both supporting and contradictory observations.
recommended_next_experiment.success_condition: At least one direct observation supports the problem and all contradictions are retained.
recommended_next_experiment.failure_condition: No direct observation supports a recurring problem worth changing workflow for.

proposed_mvp_scope.decision_to_unlock: Determine whether teams can use a deterministic governed handoff before coding-agent implementation.

confidence.rationale: The proposal is advisory and intentionally precedes external evidence.

rationale_summary: Run the cheaper interview experiment before considering the bounded MVP charter.
limitations: Recorded fixture rather than a live API call
Model output cannot issue a warrant
Synthetic evidence is not market validation
